cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking what the father did when he was laid off. The options are A to D. The passage describes the father being laid off and the effects on the family. The key part in the passage is where the narrator says: "My father has always been a hard worker and prided himself on his career. My father's unemployment created many changes in our lives. He was home all day... I began to notice how down he seemed, and how losing his job had affected his self-esteem, though he tried to be optimistic." So, the father was affected emotionally; he was "down" and his self-esteem was affected. The question is asking which option matches this description. Option C is "couldn't accept the fact easily."
